# Pinned dependencies for the sp_* recovery toolkit.
#
# Install with:
#     pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt
#
# Hashes cover wheels for Python 3.9-3.13 on Linux (x86_64/aarch64/i686,
# glibc + musl), macOS (x86_64/arm64), Windows (x86_64/arm64), plus the
# coincurve sdist for any other platform. Regenerate with `pip download`
# if you want to verify against PyPI's current digests yourself; the
# canonical values are published at https://pypi.org/pypi/<pkg>/<ver>/json
# under .urls[].digests.sha256.

coincurve==21.0.0 \
